hardGates.description: Every required criterion has an observable evidence path.
hardGates.rationaleSummary: The runtime criterion lacks a declared evidence type.

findings.claim: Runtime verification is required but no verification requirement is declared.
findings.requiredCorrection: Add the missing runtime verification requirement.
findings.rationaleSummary: One bounded contract correction makes the criterion testable.

rationaleSummary: Use the single revision to repair the evidence requirement.
